title: ME Proxy
description: Adds a proxy that exposes an ME networks storage. useful with mods like create or refined storage that add their own storage systems
body:
Adds a proxy that exposes an ME networks storage. useful with mods like create or refined storage that add their own storage systems


Useful with mods like refined storage, tom's simple storage, or create .6 that add their own storage systems. just put down an ME Proxy and connect your other storage system to it and you have access to your entire ME System's storage.

Inspired by the block of the same name from Create: Applied Kinetics, but this mod doesn't depend on create so you can use the block anywhere! Also that mod is All Rights Reserved, while this one is MIT licensed, you can do whatever the hell you want with it, and you don't have to ask to put it in a modpack or anything

Planned Features:
-the proxy as a subpart (part that sticks on cable)
